task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the target output directory for the video panels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal showing the existence of the directory '/home/ga/Videos/video_wall/'.

task_completion.description: Verify all four video panels have been exported with the correct naming convention.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal listing showing 'panel_TL.mp4', 'panel_TR.mp4', 'panel_BL.mp4', and 'panel_BR.mp4' inside the '/home/ga/Videos/video_wall/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported panels are 1920x1080, H.264, and have no audio track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., ffprobe, file command) or a GUI media properties window showing the exported MP4 files have a resolution of 1920x1080, use the H.264 codec, and lack an audio stream.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON layout manifest file has been created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing the file 'wall_manifest.json' exists in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contents of the JSON manifest match the required structure and contain correct crop coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat, less) displaying the contents of 'wall_manifest.json', showing a valid JSON structure with entries for all four panels (TL, TR, BL, BR) and their respective spatial crop coordinates (e.g., TL at 0,0; TR at 1920,0; BL at 0,1080; BR at 1920,1080).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually processed the video to create the panels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using a video processing tool (like ffmpeg commands in the terminal or a GUI video editor) to generate the outputs, rather than just renaming or copying dummy files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used spatial cropping and did not scale or squish the video.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the ffmpeg commands or GUI settings used by the agent; they must use a cropping filter (e.g., 'crop=1920:1080:x:y') and must NOT use a scale filter ('scale=1920:1080').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actively created the JSON manifest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing the JSON content in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or using a script to generate it, rather than copying a pre-existing solution file.
